headline: A Look At Nova (NVMI) Valuation After Record Q1 2026 Beat And Upgraded Outlook
summary: Nova (NasdaqGS:NVMI) is back in focus after reporting record first quarter 2026 revenue and profitability, beating its own guidance and analyst estimates, and pairing those results with stronger guidance for the second quarter. See our latest analysis for Nova. Nvidia’s weaker session on May 13 pulled the wider semiconductor group lower, and Nova’s stock also fell on that day as investors reduced risk before the Q1 report. Even so, the 90-day share price return of 14.74% and 1-year total...

headline: The NUA Strategy Retiring Executives Use to Cut Taxes on $500,000 of Company Stock in Their 401(k)
summary: A 62-year-old executive retires from Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL) with $500,000 of company stock sitting inside her 401(k), and an original cost basis of $80,000. Her advisor wants to roll the entire balance to an IRA. That single move would cost her tens of thousands of dollars she will never get back, because it forfeits the only ... headline: Nvidia surpasses Germany: How the market caps of tech giants compare to top economies
summary: Nvidia’s market capitalisation ($5.7 trillion) has overtaken Germany’s GDP ($5.45 trillion). The combined value of the five largest US companies now exceeds the total GDP of Europe’s five largest economies.View on euronews

headline: Why DBA’s Five Year Lead Over WEAT Vanished in Just Five Days
summary: The choice between Invesco DB Agriculture Fund (NYSEARCA:DBA) and Teucrium Wheat Fund (NYSEARCA:WEAT) comes down to whether you want the entire farm or a single field. DBA spreads across corn, soybeans, wheat, sugar, coffee, cocoa, cattle, and hogs. WEAT holds nothing but CBOT wheat futures, laddered across contract months. So far in 2026, that distinction ... Why DBA’s Five Year Lead Over WEAT Vanished in Just Five Days

headline: Alibaba AI Cloud Growth, Chip Access And Legal Shifts Reshape Valuation
summary: Alibaba Group Holding (NYSE:BABA) reported quarterly results highlighting AI driven cloud revenue, with external AI related cloud products reaching triple digit growth for the 11th straight quarter. The company indicated that AI related services are expected to contribute more than half of its cloud revenue within about a year. U.S. authorities approved Nvidia to supply advanced AI chips to Alibaba and select Chinese firms, followed soon after by new regulatory scrutiny around such...

headline: Nvidia’s China H200 Approval Raises New Questions For Valuation And Risk
summary: U.S. regulators approved Nvidia (NasdaqGS:NVDA) to sell H200 AI chips to around 10 major Chinese technology companies after roughly a year of export restrictions. CEO Jensen Huang traveled with President Trump on Air Force One to Beijing as one of only two CEOs in the official China delegation. Actual H200 shipments to China are still paused because of Beijing’s own rules, leaving the timing and scale of any China related data center revenue uncertain. Nvidia, traded as NasdaqGS:NVDA, sits...

headline: GRNY Beat COWZ by 11 Points This Year. Oil Prices and Interest Rates Will Decide Who Wins Next
summary: The Pacer US Cash Cows 100 ETF (NYSEARCA:COWZ) and the Fundstrat Granny Shots US Large Cap ETF (NYSEARCA:GRNY) sit on opposite ends of how quality gets defined in a large-cap portfolio. COWZ ranks the Russell 1000 by free cash flow yield and takes the top 100 names, a rules-based screen with no human override. GRNY ... GRNY Beat COWZ by 11 Points This Year.
